§7Guide Book #98§r
§lPale Oak Troot§r
§8MOB§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lBehavior§r: Neutral
•§lMob type§r: Troot, Treant, Nature-elemental, Magical.
•§lSpawns in§r: Pale Garden
•§lHealth§r: 15 §o(Wild)§r

25 §o(Tamed)§r
•§lWalk speed§r: 0.25
•§lBreathes in§r: Air, Water.
•§lTempted by§r: Beetroot, Beetroot Pie.
•§lHealed by§r: Beetroot, Beetroot Stew, Beetroot Pie.
•§lTamed by§r: Beetroot Pie
•§lPossible drops§r: Pale Oak

Log, Pale Oak Sapling, Stick, XP Orbs.
•§lAggressive toward§r §o(Tamed)§r: Owner's attackers, Owner's targets.
•§lMelee attack damage§r: 2-3
•Wild Troot can randomly sit.
•Tamed Troot can be sat down.
•They can slowly regenerate

their health when they sit or sleep.
•Wild Troot can pick up the food that tempts them and eat it.
